instruction:
Because elderly people may have difficulty standing to have their height measured, a study looked at the relationship between overall height and height to the knee. Here are data (in centimeters) for five elderly men:
$\begin{array}{cccccc}\hline Knee Height x & 57.3 & 45.9 & 42.5 & 47.3 & 54.1 \\ \hline Height y & 190.7 & 153.4 & 147 & 163.2 & 171.8 \\ \hline \end{array}$
What is the equation of the least-squares regression line for predicting height from knee height? ANSWER: $\hat{y}=$ [ANS]
